positive: A highly detailed, central, stylized illustration of intertwined cosmic flora and bioluminescent fauna. The main subject is a swirling, majestic arrangement of stylized galactic vines and glowing mandalas that form a perfect silhouette. The style should be neo-abstract botanical illustration mixed with vaporwave aesthetic, rendered with sharp, clean lines, strong contrast, and geometric precision. Color palette focuses on deep indigo, brilliant teal, ethereal gold, and luminous violet, ensuring vibrant yet muted tones for optimal textile printing. Use volumetric lighting to give the scene a sense of depth without losing the graphic flatness required for apparel. Minimalist background space to enhance print versatility. High resolution, vector art quality.
